pet_notes: A small chibi character with a cream cat-eared hooded cloak, large golden eyes, dark inner hood and limbs, gold circular ornaments, a tiny neutral mouth, and crisp medium-density pixel art.
style_notes: Preserve the approved canonical pixel density, hard black-brown outlines, cream and gold palette, chibi proportions, hood silhouette, eye shape, cloak ornaments, and simple clustered shading exactly across every state.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `pixel`: Pixel-art-adjacent digital mascot with a chunky silhouette, simple dark outline, limited palette, flat cel shading, and visible stepped edges. User style notes: Preserve the approved canonical pixel density, hard black-brown outlines, cream and gold palette, chibi proportions, hood silhouette, eye shape, cloak ornaments, and simple clustered shading exactly across every state..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
